title: Claude 2026 Prompting and Claude Code Practice · Scenario Checkpoint
summary: Apply current Anthropic guidance to tool use, examples, context, and long-running coding. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a Claude-specific prompt and eval suite. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use clear direct instructions, motivation, and relevant context for current Claude models.
Use diverse examples and structural tags when they improve task boundary recognition.
Steer tool selection with descriptions and instructions, using enforced tool choice only when required.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
